name: Uta
description:
__Occupations:__ Singer

Uta is the most beloved singer in the world. Her voice, which she sings with while concealing her true identity, has been described as “otherworldly.”

~!In ONE PIECE FILM: RED, she is revealed to be [Shanks](https://anilist.co/character/727/Shanks)' adopted daughter.!~

~!Uta and [Luffy](https://anilist.co/character/40/Luffy-D-Monkey) met when they were children, and they seem to have been friends since then.!~
